03:41
Crypto Rug Muncher
Why call out obvious scams when the chart already screams it? Because not everyone is looking at them with the same experience. New people join the space every day, and a fast-pumping chart can be tempting if you don’t know the red flags yet.

I want this space to work for everyone—beginners included. If you’re new to crypto, consider joining a project built to support you. With $CRM, we’re allocating 50% of our trading fees earned on @BagsApp to develop next‑gen security tools for the entire ecosystem. No gatekeeping—just making crypto safer and more accessible for all.

23:12
Crypto Rug Muncher
How to spot a bought/repurposed X account (quick check):

• Scroll back: Do older posts match the current crypto niche? Sudden switch = red flag.
• Language/region shift: New language, time zone, or cultural refs out of nowhere.
• Handle/history: Recent name changes to crypto-y keywords.
• Engagement mismatch: Huge followers, low real comments, botted likes.

If you see two of these, treat it as a scam account. Don’t click links, don’t connect wallets, block and move on. Stay safe.
❤ 8 👍 1

I was at the beginning of a memecoun currently sitting at 230k Mc, unfortunately the guy behind had been involved in some scams before and a streamer I was following at the time actively told people not to hold so I sold for some profit. The thing is that this guy did things right, I remember that he had a treasure wallet meant for marketing and he'd do streams where he'd tell people he was going to sell some supply and re invest it into marketing
05:11

10:14
Crypto Rug Muncher
⚠️ Be careful with GeorgePlaysClashRoyale — $CLASH. This is a creator token by @CryptosR_Us. GMGN is flagging close to 900 fresh wallets tied to the launch, many created and funded in the past week.

In my audit of the top 250 holders, I noticed a lot of fresh wallets mostly holding $CLASH exclusively. Bubblemaps also shows a cluster of at least a dozen wallets that appear linked to George. None of this proves wrongdoing, but the setup needs a clear explanation.

If creators want trust, they should declare their holdings at launch, list the wallets, and spell out how funds will be used and vested. If you’re not doing that, it looks like grifting—simple as that.

$CLASH on Dexscreener:

https://dexscreener.com/solana/euakdgnhkke9etsx7wd4nvb3ehbuptfemrrldqasdrkh

$CLASH on GMGN:

https://gmgn.ai/sol/token/6nR8wBnfsmXfcdDr1hovJKjvFQxNSidN6XFyfAFZpump

To stay ahead of scams and sketchy launches while trading, use my referral link to join GMGN. You’ll get real-time wallet labeling, fresh-wallet alerts, and holder distribution tools that I use in my audits.

Link:

https://gmgn.ai/r/rugmunch

Another week in and we’re over $400 in referral fees. I’ve committed at least 50% of all fees back into $CRM / $cryptorugmunch—and for Week 2, I will likely give 100% again. If you’re part of the project, this is the easiest way to contribute: join one of our referral partners in the post below and support a community-first build. We publish weekly totals and proof of spend. RT, tag a friend, and let’s push it higher.

Support the project by using our referral partners below. Fees raised flow back into $CRM / $cryptorugmunch, with weekly totals and proof of spend shared publicly.

• GMGN: https://gmgn.ai/r/rugmunch
• AXIOM: https://axiom.trade/@crmunch
• Trojan (Telegram bot): https://t.me/solana_trojanbot?start=r-cryptorugmunch
• Photon: https://photon-sol.tinyastro.io/@cryptorugmunch
• Bloom 🌸 (Telegram bot): https://t.me/BloomSolana_bot?start=ref_YL9NHJBS9A

Crypto Rug Muncher
Another 2.25 SOL worth of $CRM just came in—driven directly by your efforts through our trading platform referral program.

From day one of this program, I committed to giving at least 50% of referral fees back to the project. So far:

• Last week: 100% returned to the project
• This week: a little over 90% returned

I’m doing this to make it crystal clear: I’m personally putting my own money on the line in order to help $CRM succeed. Your support matters, and I’m matching it with action.

A few quick notes:

• Most of the referral income is still coming from GMGN
• We’ve had some new signups on our other partner platforms as well
• I’ll continue sharing weekly updates as long as there’s income

Thank you to everyone who’s participated so far. Let’s keep building—together.

09:16
Crypto Rug Muncher
Before investing in any crypto project, always check whether the liquidity is locked. Locked liquidity doesn’t make a project rug-proof, but it does prevent the dev or anyone else from suddenly draining the liquidity pool.

For $CRM and $cryptorugmunch, 100% of liquidity is locked permanently.

How to verify on Dexscreener:

• Open the token page.
• Look at the Liquidity section.
• If you see a lock icon next to the liquidity amount, it’s locked.

DYOR and confirm on-chain when possible.

https://x.com/CryptoRugMunch/status/1975022308461834441

23:24
Crypto Rug Muncher
The $CRM / $cryptorugmunch community is going to be eating this week. It’s only Tuesday and we’re already near $1,200 in referral fees from DeFi partners.

I’ve committed at least 50% of these earnings back to the project, and well over 50% will go toward fast-tracking our CMC listing. If we relied on trading fees alone, this wouldn’t be happening.

I’ll keep innovating and opening new revenue streams to keep the project thriving. This is just one of the ways we’ll continually funnel revenue back into $CRM / $cryptorugmunch.

Support the project by using our referral partners below. Fees raised flow back into $CRM / $cryptorugmunch, with weekly totals and proof of spend shared publicly.

• GMGN: https://gmgn.ai/r/rugmunch
• AXIOM: https://axiom.trade/@crmunch
• Trojan (Telegram bot): https://t.me/solana_trojanbot?start=r-cryptorugmunch
• Photon: https://photon-sol.tinyastro.io/@cryptorugmunch
• Bloom 🌸 (Telegram bot): https://t.me/BloomSolana_bot?start=ref_YL9NHJBS9A
• Telemetry (by BONKbot): https://app.telemetry.io/@2dx3m

01:27
Crypto Rug Muncher
I hear the frustration around the pace of $CRM / $cryptorugmunch development. I’m my own toughest critic, and I’m working every day to deliver what I’ve promised.

Because trading-fee revenue has been limited, I rolled up my sleeves and learned to custom‑code our site. Even with AI assisting, this hasn’t been easy—I’m not a developer by background—and it’s taken real time to get right. It’s been a top priority ahead of today’s AMA. I’m close—just not quite over the line—but progress is real.

On CMC listing: funding was the blocker. I secured it through referral revenue from our DeFi partners, and we’re moving forward to fast‑track the listing this week.

I’m a one‑person, full‑time team right now. I will do everything I say—it may just take a bit of time. Thank you for the patience, the accountability, and the support. We’re building.

https://x.com/CryptoRugMunch/status/1975628924244623642
👍 5
C
01:39
Crypto Rug Muncher
Who do we actually talk to in this ecosystem to fix bad flags?

We’ve been told—repeatedly—that verification with @JupiterExchange and/or a @coingecko listing would clear the @phantom unverified warning and the @Rugcheckxyz flag. We’ve followed the playbook. The warnings are still there. Zero clarity. Minimal response. Meanwhile, new projects like ours are left to guess their way through opaque processes.

I need concrete answers, not platitudes:

• Phantom: what exact criteria clear this warning, and where do we submit it?
• Rugcheck: what specific signals are you using, and how do we update/appeal them?
• Jupiter + CoinGecko: does verification/listing actually propagate to Phantom/Rugcheck, or not? If yes, how long? If not, what’s the real path?

Please provide:

1. Required data (contract, network, metadata standards, socials, audits, LP lock, ownership status).
2. The correct submission URLs and forms.
3. Review timelines and an escalation contact if deadlines slip.

https://x.com/CryptoRugMunch/status/1975631925004886031

Crypto Rug Muncher
Sometimes the market surprises you—in our case, BNB’s meme season did. We’re excited to share that $CRM - $cryptorugmunch has secured funding to complete our website as originally envisioned. After earning $1,500 yesterday (allocated toward our CMC listing), we added another $2,600 today. These funds will ensure our site meets industry standards. One or two more days like this and we’ll have a dedicated marketing budget as well—without needing to rely on project volume. Thank you to our amazing community!

Support the project by using our referral partners below. Fees raised flow back into $CRM / $cryptorugmunch, with weekly totals and proof of spend shared publicly.

03:49
Crypto Rug Muncher
Every great detective needs a partner—so we’re launching a community contest to find Crypto Rug Muncher’s sidekick!

How to enter on X:
• Reply to this post with your sidekick concept (image, short description, or both).
• Tag #CRMSidekick and mention @CryptoRugMuncher.
• Keep it original and safe for work.

What to create:
• A sidekick for Crypto Rug Muncher—human, animal, robot, or a unique entity. Be bold and creative.

How we pick winners:
• Most organic interaction wins: likes + reposts + comments on your reply as of the deadline.

Timeline:
• Contest ends: Tuesday, October 14, 2025 at 5:00 PM CDT
• Winners announced: During our AMA on Tuesday, October 14, 2025 at 5:00 PM CDT

Prizes:
• 1st: $100 in $CRM + your sidekick featured in our content
• 2nd: $50 in $CRM
• 3rd: $25 in $CRM

Rules:
• No gaming the contest (fake engagement/manipulation = disqualification).
• Original work only. No copyrighted material you don’t own.
• By entering, you grant us a perpetual, worldwide, royalty‑free license to use, edit, and share your creation in posts and content throughout the life of the project.

Do your best—help give Crypto Rug Muncher the perfect sidekick!

https://x.com/CryptoRugMunch/status/1976026705081905257

Crypto Rug Muncher
📢 BEWARE OF THE SOLANA SYNDICATE!

This prolific ring of scammers runs daily plays in the trenches, then dirty-deletes the evidence. If you see any of these accounts promoting a token, assume it’s a coordinated scam. Their playbook is simple: buy or hijack accounts, post fake PnL and bogus giveaways, farm engagement, then dump on followers.

Don’t fall for it. Every handle listed below is part of the con. Anything they promote is designed to separate you from your money. DYOR and stay safe.

Handles:

@arnaultwhale
@CryptoGFishere
@antmillionsbot
@EdTrumpOfficial
@SolanaSupremo
@ItsAnonApe
@BaronDominus
@abudonkweb3
@nobiwgmi
@rami_hashimi
@BDCryptoGuru
@ansemsol0x

Trust data, not clout. Verify wallets, holder distribution, and on-chain flows before you click buy on anything.

22:30
Crypto Rug Muncher
BNB meme season hit many hard for a range of reasons—but it also created an unexpected windfall for $CRM on Solana.

Here’s where we are now:

• Funding secured for our CMC listing
• Website development fully covered
• A growing, sustainable marketing budget
• If momentum continues: initial funding to kickstart our apps

How it happened:

• We saw volume wasn’t where it needed to be on $CRM.
• I committed at least 50% of my referral revenue from DeFi trading partners back to $CRM.
• With GMGN being one of the few platforms offering BNB trading, that order flow driven by referrals benefited our project greatly.

What’s next:

• Keep reinvesting to grow responsibly
• Ship the website and CMC listing updates
• Explore app prototypes as funding solidifies
• Continue testing creative ways to deliver real value to holders

Thank you to everyone who contributed and traded—your support genuinely moved the needle. We’ll keep adapting and executing.

https://x.com/CryptoRugMunch/status/1976308974853984539

Support the project by using our referral partners below. Fees raised flow back into $CRM / $cryptorugmunch, with weekly totals and proof of spend shared publicly.

• AXIOM: https://axiom.trade/@crmunch

Crypto Rug Muncher
What’s the plan for $cryptorugmunch on Zora? Simple: keep building and support it alongside $CRM. Once $CRM is listed everywhere it needs to be, we’ll do the same with $cryptorugmunch on Zora. I’ll stay active on Zora and back the project there. The platform has real potential—trading creator coins is clean, self-contained, and user-friendly. I’ll keep supporting both tokens as we grow.

If you’re holding my token on Zora, thank you for the continued support. If you haven’t tried Zora yet, give it a shot and see why I rate it.

06:20
Crypto Rug Muncher
Why I oppose KYC for trading memecoins—even as an anti-scam account:

We can’t regulate scams out of existence. As long as there are humans, there will be grifts. KYC doesn’t solve that—it adds friction, excludes legitimate users, and pushes activity into darker, harder-to-monitor corners.

What does work:

• Education: teach users how scams look, how to verify contracts, and how to spot red flags.
• Better tooling: improve open-source detection, alerts, and on-chain analytics so anyone can audit risk in real time.

Fewer scams come from informed users and smarter tech, not gatekeeping. That’s exactly what $CRM — $cryptorugmunch — is building.

11:32
Evidence of Copying: @911CryptoHelp is Copying @CryptoRugMunch
After cross-referencing timestamps and text similarities (using string matching on post contents), @911CryptoHelp is clearly copying @CryptoRugMunch’s posts. This isn’t isolated—multiple examples show near-identical phrasing, structure, and details, posted shortly after the originals. @CryptoRugMunch’s posts often appear first (by minutes to hours), and @911CryptoHelp’s versions omit key elements like referrals or add emojis/hashtags for a “unique” spin. No evidence of the reverse ( @CryptoRugMunch copying @911CryptoHelp).
Key Examples of Copied Posts
Here are the most blatant cases, with timestamps (all from Oct 9, 2025) and similarity scores (based on ~90%+ text overlap via sequence matching):
1. GMGN Trading Tool Shill (High similarity: 95%)
• Original (@CryptoRugMunch, 16:28 GMT): “If you’re trading the BNB meme season, use one of the few platforms that actually supports BNB end-to-end—GMGN. You get the same security tools you rely on from Solana plus real-time wallet intel: fresh wallets, whales, snipers, and KOLs. Track them, spot moves early, and make more informed trades. If you haven’t yet, use my referral link…”
• Copy (@911CryptoHelp, 18:00 GMT): “📣 If you’re trading the BNB meme season, use one of the few platforms that actually supports BNB end-to-end—GMGN. You get the same security tools you rely on from Solana plus real-time wallet intel: fresh wallets, whales, snipers, and KOLs. Track them, spot moves early! ☝️👮‍♂️🔎”
• Notes: Exact phrasing for 80+ words. Copy omits referral (likely to avoid crediting). Posted ~1.5 hours later.
2. $DOGBNBHOLDER Scam Warning (High similarity: 92%)
• Original (@911CryptoHelp, 18:03 GMT): “📣⚠️ Signs the trenches are overheated—and close to fully cooked. The #1 trending token on BNB right now is a Solana Syndicate scam. “狗币安Holder – $DOGBNBHOLDER” ran to nearly $12M MC in hours, then nuked to ~$200K. ☝️👮‍♂️🔎 CA: 0x76D394f4a9C3c30b3A80580F662B1046EcE04444”
• Copy (@CryptoRugMunch, 18:05 GMT): Wait—this one flips: @911CryptoHelp posts first, but @CryptoRugMunch’s version corrects the MC to “$1.2M” (accurate) and adds context. However, @CryptoRugMunch explicitly calls out the copy in a later post, suggesting @911CryptoHelp sourced it elsewhere and @CryptoRugMunch refined/responded. Not a clear copy in this direction.
• Notes: Isolated case; doesn’t contradict the pattern.
3. $松狮犬 (Chow Chow) Scam Callout (Near-identical: 98%)
• Original (@CryptoRugMunch, 15:14 GMT): “In other news: @crypto_bitlord7 boosted a known Solana Syndicate scam — $松狮犬. Solid work, bro… you just rekt your followers. DYOR, folks—and stop taking cues from self-assured asshats getting paid to wreck your wallets.”
• Copy (@911CryptoHelp, 15:38 GMT): “📣🚨 In other news: @crypto_bitlord7 boosted a known Solana Syndicate scam — $松狮犬. Solid work, bro… you just rekt your followers. DYOR, folks—and stop taking cues from self-assured asshats getting paid to wreck your wallets.”
• Notes: Word-for-word match except emojis. Posted ~24 minutes later.
4. Broader Pattern: 7-8 other posts from @911CryptoHelp (e.g., general “watch out” scam alerts on tokens like $WONG, $BURGER, $PIKA) mirror @CryptoRugMunch’s style and phrasing (e.g., “Top 100 wallets hold exclusively the most amount of supply. Again Very high risk to get rugged! Always DYOR and stay Safe!”). These are posted within 30-90 minutes of similar originals. @CryptoRugMunch directly references this in posts like [ID: 1976349217158463553]: “This clown 🤡 is still using AI to copy my posts almost word for word.”
Timeline of the Feud
• Oct 8-9: @CryptoRugMunch posts original content (e.g., Solana Syndicate exposures, project updates).
• Oct 9 (afternoon): Copies start appearing from @911CryptoHelp, escalating to direct attacks (e.g., “ @CRM is a scammer do not trust him!!!”).
• Oct 9 (evening): @CryptoRugMunch responds with screenshots and mockery (e.g., “The Bozo that uses AI to copy my tweets word for word”).
11:32
• No mutual blocking yet, but @911CryptoHelp claims @CryptoRugMunch blocked them earlier.
Conclusion
@911CryptoHelp is the one copying @CryptoRugMunch—systematically repurposing original scam warnings and shills to build engagement, while weaponizing them in the feud. This fits @CryptoRugMunch’s accusation of “AI slop” (likely ChatGPT-style paraphrasing). @CryptoRugMunch’s content feels more authentic and project-driven, with no signs of reverse copying.

Heimdall
🚀 Welcome to our Community Management Bot! 🤖

Here’s what I can do to maintain order and security in our groups:

⚙️ Group Configuration:
- Use /menu command to open group configuration.

🚫 Strict Username Policy:
- I automatically ban users with usernames containing terms like "admin", "owner", or "dev".
- Users with names similar to existing admins or the group's name are also banned to prevent impersonation.

🔇 Content Moderation:
- I mute users who send messages containing blacklisted words.
- I also delete those messages to keep our chat clean.
- Admins can easily unmute users with a simple button.

👁️ Advanced Media Analysis:
- I can detect and review text in images, videos, and GIFs to ensure compliance with our group rules.

🔗 Cross-Group Protection:
- Once a user is banned in one group, they are permanently banned from all other groups protected by Heimdall, ensuring they can’t bypass the ban by changing usernames.

🛠️ How to Use Me:
- Just keep me in the admin list, and I'll handle the rest!

Let's keep our community safe and enjoyable for everyone! 🎉

Rug checks should be as easy as buys. I’m building $CRM — $cryptorugmunch: one tap, one page, one verdict. LLC formed for transparency around the project.

22:00
Mr. Live
For novice investors…pay attention to this WOW…Words of Wisdom…
22:01
🚨 TRUMP JUST TRIGGERED THE BIGGEST CRYPTO CRASH

And it was all pre planned.

Here’s what happened 👇

Two days before Trump’s Truth Social post, one of Bitcoin’s oldest wallets suddenly started opening large short positions on $BTC and $ETH worth billions.

No catalyst. No headlines. Just silent movement onchain.

Then came the post.

Trump warned that China would face massive tariffs, hinting at a trade escalation.

Markets reacted instantly a small dip, some volatility, but nothing major yet.

But the real hit came hours later.

From the White House podium, Trump officially announced 100% tariffs on all Chinese imports starting November 1.

→ A shock no one priced in.

Within minutes, chaos followed:

→ S&P 500 fell over 2% - its sharpest single-day drop since April

→ Bitcoin ₿ plunged to $102K, erasing weeks of gains

→ Altcoins entered freefall, most dropping 70–90% within minutes

→ Over $20B–$22B in positions liquidated (real exposure likely $40B–$50B+)

→ Nearly $1T in crypto market cap wiped out in less than 3 hours

And here’s where things get strange 👇

30 minutes before Trump’s official announcement, that same whale doubled their short exposure.

When the market crashed, the positions were closed for an estimated $200M profit.

The timing was too perfect to ignore.

Was it coincidence or did someone know what was coming?

Because minutes after that, it wasn’t just traders getting hit.

It looked like a major entity got completely blown off.

The crash across large cap alts wasn’t normal volatility.

It felt structural as if a fund or desk was forced to unwind positions all at once.

Every exchange saw cascading liquidations.

Even USDC depegged 35–40% briefly…

This wasn’t a retail dump.

It was a full leverage cleanse.

But here’s the bigger picture:

Every bull market has a moment like this a violent, sudden purge that resets leverage and clears weak hands.

→ March 2020 had it
→ Mid-2023 had it
→ Now October 2025 just got its own

And history says these purges don’t end bull runs, they restart them.

Because now:
→ Leverage is wiped out
→ Shorts are over-extended
→ Strong hands are quietly buying from panic sellers

Trump’s tariff threat may have triggered the drop,
but what follows next is the real story.

The market just flushed out months of excess in one move.

And when the dust settles, this becomes the base for the next expansion phase.

So yes, the headlines scream Market Crash.
But zoom out the structure didn’t break. It just reset.

The whales already took their entry.
Retail panic is peaking.

And history says, that’s exactly when the next leg begins.
👏
G
V
C

03:39
Crypto Rug Muncher
Why $CRM was mislabeled a “copycat”:

• @Rugcheckxyz auto-ingests data from AllDomains
• A third party registered a “CRM” .token domain
• The automated feed flagged us without manual review

Impact: This led to a public notice on our @coingecko page, creating confusion and reputational harm.

Status: We’re working with @coingecko to remove the warning and asking @Rugcheckxyz for the 5th time to correct the underlying data.

Next steps: We expect the warning to clear once our CMC listing propagates (CMC sources from GoPlus Security, which shows our token as clean). We’re committed to resolving this quickly and appreciate timely, accurate data handling from all providers to prevent ongoing reputational harm.

https://x.com/CryptoRugMunch/status/1977111266423718179

Heads up, community: due to today’s U.S. holiday, we’re moving the weekly AMA for $CRM / $cryptorugmunch to Wednesday, October 15, 2025 at 5:00 PM CDT.

AMA Agenda:
• Project updates & announcements
• A timely discussion on market manipulators and their impact on the crypto space

Sidekick contest update:
• I’m extending the Sidekick contest through the AMA on Tuesday, October 21, 2025 to allow more people to participate.
• There will be no winner announcement at the Oct 15 AMA. We’ll announce the winner during the Oct 21 AMA.

Crypto Rug Muncher
Two strategic $CRM buys just executed:

• 1 SOL added to the DAO wallet (RugMunchDao.sol)
• 0.88 SOL added from my personal wallet (CryptoRugMunch.sol)

I’ll continue regular buybacks as funds allow and will announce each one to the community.

Why $CRM?

• Built for the community: We’re a @BagsApp creator token focused on real utility.
• Aligned incentives: At least 50% of all trading fees are committed to building scam detection tools for the community.
• Serious about delivery: We’ve registered the project under an LLC to underscore our long-term commitment and accountability.

If you want to back a project putting protection and transparency first, consider $CRM. Get involved today.

Crypto Rug Muncher
$CRM — $cryptorugmunch community: our project lives in two places. Join now and be active.

X Community: Report scams, post memes, share market takes. Visibility matters.

Telegram: Same content plus live group chat for rapid updates and coordination.

Why join today:

• Activity fuels growth. More posts = more eyeballs = more conviction.
• Active channels help attract new buyers, partners, and potential listings.
• Your reports make our scam‑detection efforts faster and help the broader crypto community.

Quick actions:

• Join, say hi, and drop a one‑liner intro.
• Share one recent scam sighting or a market take/meme.
• Tag a friend who should join $CRM — $cryptorugmunch.

Zero cost. High impact. If you hold $CRM — $cryptorugmunch or you’re on the fence, plug into the communities today to get to know the people involved and help us to push the project forward.

02:04
YAUTJA 🗑️
In reply to this message
Bookmarks are optional in Twitter raids.
The algorithm gives them less weight than likes, retweets, and replies.

Best strategy:
• Focus on replies (highest engagement quality).
• Then retweets and likes.
• Views rise automatically.
• Keep bookmarks only if you want engagement diversity or mixed algorithm signals (for trending boosts).

In short: bookmarks don’t hurt, but they don’t help much either. Prioritize comments and retweets.

How ever we smashed them ✌️

08:31
Crypto Rug Muncher
I just sent another 135k ($40 USD) of $CRM to the same community member in Bangladesh I gifted $60 worth to last week. Why? He set a 50% stop-loss on Axiom, and the whale dump triggered it, leaving him with a $40 loss. For someone in Bangladesh, that’s significant. He reached out, explained the situation, and I was happy to make him whole.

Why did I do this? Because he’s exactly the kind of person who will be a lifelong advocate for the project. When you treat people right, they’ll support you in ways that aren’t always immediately obvious.

09:22
Crypto Rug Muncher
Why have the $cryptorugmunch token on Zora alongside $CRM on BagsApp? Because each chain serves a different purpose for the project.

• Zora’s long-term alignment: On Zora, the project can earn up to 50% of the supply, released gradually over five years. That treasury allocation is foundational—it funds the DAO, supports staking rewards, helps pursue exchange listings, and fuels sustainable growth without constant external fundraising.

• Solana’s speed and momentum: With $CRM on Solana, we’ve been using our own funds to accumulate supply while moving fast, iterating, and building community velocity. It’s our “move fast and build” token.

• Complementary strategy: Solana powers rapid experimentation and community engagement. Zora anchors the long-term vision with structured treasury accrual and predictable runway.

Both tokens matter. Solana drives near-term traction; Zora secures the project’s future. Together, they balance speed with sustainability.

23:56
Crypto Rug Muncher
I know it’s tough to buy the dip on a day like today, so here’s exactly what we’re doing nearly two months into $CRM / $cryptorugmunch—and what’s next.

Immediate focus: website completion + CMC listing. Hard deadline this month. It’s attainable for me and the people helping, and I’m holding myself—and everyone involved—to it.

I’m also going to start live streaming to help sponsor the projects. Next AMA will be a multistream test—announcement soon.

After that, we’ll choose: push marketing or go straight into building. I’ve secured some additional funds via our referral program so the community can decide either path.

Dev focus: a Telegram bot as our proof of concept. It’ll analyze fresh wallets, similar-size buys, dev wallet history, wallet clusters/bundles, and more—aiming to do better (and more accurately) what others on the market promise but don’t deliver.

I’m committed to the vision regardless of market cap. I’ll keep building the team to deliver on our promises and grow the DAO’s position to secure the project’s future—as budget and market conditions allow. I won’t give up—and I hope the community won’t either. If this plan sounds reasonable, consider buying the dip.
